title: Tunnel video-first program over loaded clip

metricComparisons.description: tunnel program's heavy feedback (0.92) with only light modulate (0.1) should hold frames longer than the raw video baseline, reducing frame-to-frame temporal diff (observed ~-0.0035 on ci-smoke.mp4 over two runs; threshold set at -0.001 with ~3x margin)

expectedVideo: applying tunnel should pull the clip into a receding feedback tunnel with light rotation and slight scale-up
expectedAudio: feedback delay (0.18s) and gentle modulation should add a receding, hollow persistence without washing transients
audio side is MANUAL REVIEW ONLY: program-level exported-audio gates land with M5.7-143 (video-first QA manifest reorder)
manualChecks: Does the program clearly feel like a receding tunnel rather than a static effect chain layered on top?
Is the audio feedback musical and locked to the visual persistence?
